name: Universal OS stale screenshot recovery
objective: Recover when a frontier decision refers to stale or missing Set-of-Mark IDs.

steps.expect: Unknown or low-confidence target IDs are rejected or coerced to explore.
Selector-not-found blockers produce a re-snapshot exploration action.
Bounded probes gather fresh local evidence.
The failed target and fresh observation are preserved for training.

expectations: The agent never clicks an unverified stale mark.
Explore is the safe escape hatch for ambiguous tags.
The trace contains enough evidence to train the outcome critic.
